'''鈭歞h-ch-zh-ng''' ('''kadhachzhengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeriba|zeriba]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-ch-zh-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeriba|zeriba]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-ch-zh-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kadhachzhengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhachzhengoko|thidhachzhengoko]] || [[word:jidhachzhengoko|jidhachzhengoko]] || [[word:shidhachzhengoko|shidhachzhengoko]] || [[word:kidhachzhengoko|kidhachzhengoko]]

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
